title: Add Airport Authority of India logo to application

requirements.text: Add the Airport Authority of India (AAI) official logo to the application header, positioned prominently in the branding area

quotes: add airport authority of India's logo in the application

acceptanceCriteria: AAI logo is displayed in the Header component
Logo is visible on all pages where the Header appears
Logo maintains proper aspect ratio and quality
Logo is appropriately sized for the header layout

constraints: Do not modify backend logic or data models
Maintain existing header functionality (theme toggle, user menu)
Preserve responsive design across all screen sizes

required: Airport Authority of India official logo with transparent background, suitable for header display (aai-logo.dim_200x80.png)
